title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week brought major stability improvements to OpsPal's platform with automatic cleanup systems that remove outdated configurations and prevent startup errors. We've also enhanced Salesforce workflows by adding smart detection for Dynamic Forms and automatic profile assignments for new record types. The platform now automatically fixes missing dependencies and prevents common configuration issues that could interrupt your RevOps workflows.

entries.headline: HubSpot integration now matches Salesforce feature capabilities
Platform automatically cleans up old files during updates
details: Removes outdated cache files older than 7 days
Clears stuck session files older than 5 minutes
Alerts you when memory usage files get too large

entries.headline: Platform removes broken automation scripts automatically
details: Works across Windows, Mac, and Linux systems
Finds and removes automation scripts that no longer exist
Prevents errors from outdated or missing components

entries.headline: Outdated plugins automatically removed when starting sessions
Salesforce workflows now handle Dynamic Forms and record types better
details: Prevents field addition errors when Dynamic Forms is active on your pages
Automatically assigns new record types to System Administrator profiles
Reduces workflow blocking from routing decisions

entries.headline: Platform automatically installs missing dependencies at startup
details: Shows clear error messages when installations fail
Provides manual fix commands when needed
Runs background repairs for common issues

entries.headline: Resolved false error messages about missing packages
